# Z3 Safety

> Z3 Safety is a California workplace safety operator serving mid-size industrial operations across Central and Southern California. We build practical safety infrastructure — training, AED compliance, first aid, PPE, and ongoing operational support — for employers who need real readiness, not paper compliance.

## Positioning

**Core message:** We don't train for compliance. We train for reality.

We are not a national catalog vendor. We are a local California team. We show up on-site. We answer the phone the same business day. We know Cal/OSHA Title 8 cold.

## Who we serve

- California industrial operations with 100–400 employees (sweet spot: 100–200)
- Manufacturing, warehousing, logistics, distribution, construction, property management, food production, healthcare support
- Primary buyers: Safety Managers, HR Leaders, Facilities Managers, Operations Directors, CFOs

## Service area

Central and Southern California: Santa Maria, Bakersfield, Central Valley, Greater Los Angeles, Orange County, Inland Empire, San Diego, Border Region.

## Services

### 1. Safety Training
On-site CPR/AED certification, OSHA 10 and 30, First Aid Responder, Bloodborne Pathogens, Forklift, Lockout/Tagout. All delivered at your facility with full Cal/OSHA-compliant documentation and refresher tracking.

### 2. First Aid Service
Cabinet supply and stocking, Cal/OSHA compliance verification, scheduled service visits, multi-location coordination, inventory tracking. Configurations matched to your specific industry and Cal/OSHA title.

### 3. Safety Products & PPE
PPE (gloves, eyewear, respirators), safety signage and labeling, emergency equipment, lockout/tagout supplies, spill kits, hazmat/chemical labeling. Sourced for California Title 8 requirements.

### 4. AED Vantage — AED Compliance & Management
Two-tier compliance program for AED maintenance:

- **Program 1 — Self-Inspection:** Your team performs monthly inspections via QR code on any smartphone. Z3 manages all documentation, compliance tracking, monthly reports, and consumable lifecycle alerts.
- **Program 2 — On-Site Inspection:** Z3 technicians perform all monthly on-site inspections and documentation. Zero internal burden.

Both programs include: medical direction (physician oversight as required by California), local agency notification (EMS/fire), automated monthly compliance reports, post-cardiac event support, and policy/procedure development.

### 5. Workplace Safety Support
Free on-site safety walkthroughs, Emergency Action Plan development, workplace disaster planning, new business startup program, Cal/OSHA regulation guidance, heart event response planning, safety committee support, incident investigation.

## How we work

1. **Free on-site walkthrough** — We come to your facility, look at training records, AEDs, first aid cabinets, and documentation. Surface the gaps. No commitment.
2. **Practical safety plan** — We build a program tailored to your size, industry, and Cal/OSHA requirements.
3. **Fast implementation** — Training scheduled, AEDs compliant, cabinets stocked, documentation set up. We coordinate so your floor keeps running.
4. **Ongoing partnership** — Monthly reporting, scheduled service visits, refresher tracking, responsive support.

## Why operations teams call us

- Training records scattered across spreadsheets, binders, and old emails
- AEDs maintained by no one in particular — until an inspector shows up
- Three vendors, no coordination, no single point of contact
- Audit documentation assembled the week of
- Workers' comp creeping up with no clear root cause
- Safety split across HR, ops, and facilities — owned by no one
- Shift turnover eating into certified coverage faster than refreshers
- Headcount grew faster than the safety program could keep up

## Differentiators

- **California-first.** We work Cal/OSHA Title 8 every day. Federal OSHA is the floor. Your auditors will know the difference.
- **One partner.** Not five vendors. Training, first aid, AEDs, products, and support under one contract, one contact, one audit trail.
- **On-site delivery.** All training and inspections at your facility, on your schedule. No off-site certification mills.
- **Same-day response.** You call, you hear back. Same business day.
- **AED Vantage.** Not a device in a box. A fully managed compliance system with medical direction included.

## Credentials

- Cal/OSHA Title 8 program standards
- AHA Certified — American Heart Association CPR/AED
- Physician medical direction for AED programs
- OSHA Outreach — OSHA 10 & 30 authorized training

## Contact

- Phone: 714.394.4070
- Email: sales@z3safety.com
- Response time: Same business day
- Service area: Central & Southern California

## Customer rating

5.0 stars on Google Reviews across 95 verified reviews from California operations teams in manufacturing, distribution, property management, food production, logistics, construction, healthcare support, and restaurant operations. Multiple reviewers cite 5–7 year customer tenure. Named customer organizations include AES, ACCO Brands, and Duke's Huntington Beach.
